name: insurance adjusters processing 5–15 claims/month tool
description: For insurance adjusters processing 5–15 claims/month, lack of timely updates causes delayed claim resolutions. We provide automated status monitoring instead of manual follow-ups with insurance companies.
problem_solved: lack of timely updates on claim status
